name: Pilot Travel Center (Town Pump #906)
description: Pilot-branded Town Pump travel plaza at I-90 Exit 408 with 10 diesel lanes, showers, laundry, McDonald's and Subway.

name: Love's Travel Stop #1043
description: Love's Travel Plaza opened April 2026 at I-90 Exit 432 with 177 truck parking spaces, nine diesel bays, seven showers, an Arby's and a CAT Scale.

name: TA Laurel (TravelCenters of America #261)
description: TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-90 Exit 437 with 80 truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, TA Cafe/Iron Skillet and a CAT Scale.

name: Flying J Travel Plaza (Town Pump #923)
description: Flying J-branded Town Pump travel plaza at I-90 Exit 455 in Lockwood with eight fuel lanes, nine showers, laundry, truck parking and a CAT Scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center (Town Pump #915)
description: Pilot-branded Town Pump travel center at I-90 Exit 455 in Billings with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, drivers lounge and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #679
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-90 Exit 495 with six diesel islands, roughly 70 truck parking spaces, showers and a Hardee's restaurant.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #1043
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Love's Travel Plaza at I-90 Exit 432.

name: CAT Scale at TA Laurel
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TravelCenters of America travel center at I-90 Exit 437.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Billings
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Flying J travel plaza at I-90 Exit 455 in Billings.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Billings
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Pilot travel center at I-90 Exit 455 in Billings.

name: Hardin Rest Area Motor Carrier Services Weigh Station
description: MDT Motor Carrier Services 'Type A' weigh station added to the westbound Hardin rest area (mile marker 476) as part of the 2024-2025 rest area reconstruction.

name: Greycliff Rest Area
description: State rest area at I-90 mile marker 380 with truck and RV parking, restrooms and pet areas; slated for MDT's real-time truck parking availability system.

name: Columbus Rest Area
description: State rest area at I-90 mile marker 418 with roughly 50 overnight truck/RV parking spaces; equipped with MDT's real-time truck parking availability system.

name: Hardin Rest Area
description: Rebuilt state rest area (reopened 2025) at I-90 mile marker 476 between Billings and Hardin with expanded truck parking and ADA upgrades.

name: Fly In Lube & Wash
description: Locally owned truck and RV wash and lube in Lockwood off I-90 Exit 456 that services semi-trucks, RVs and trailers.

name: Hoogies Industrial Cleaning
description: Trailer washout and industrial cleaning service near I-90 Exit 450 offering tanker/hazmat washouts by appointment.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Billings
description: Commercial/OTR truck tire dealer near I-90 Exit 455 in Lockwood offering 24-hour commercial road service.

name: Hanser's Towing & Semi Truck Heavy Wrecker
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing and recovery company serving the Billings-area I-90 corridor including Hardin, Columbus and Big Timber.
